scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspaces --if-present
scripts.dev:api: npm run kill:api && npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w apps/web
